blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 174 ft. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tuesday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
